title: Kaiju Yi Zuo Shan
synopsis:
He starts with a mountain stronghold and two members (a strategist and a groom), determined to build the strongest stronghold. He transmigrates to a chaotic world, owning a stronghold on the verge of collapse. Faced with this bloody and chaotic world, will he rob money, food, and women to become a carefree mountain king, or will he spill his blood, clash with the heroes of the world, and fight for a name that will resonate throughout history, asking: Are kings and generals born with a special destiny?

(Source: Tencent, translated)
